description: Extract every DOI from a markdown literature review, resolve each against doi.org and pull metadata from the CrossRef API, then emit a JSON verification report listing verified vs failed DOIs with their bibliographic metadata.
rules: read-only — never edits the source markdown
DOIs are matched with the pattern 10.\d{4,}/...
each DOI is checked against https://doi.org/api/handles and https://api.crossref.org/works
report is written to record_store as citation_report.json
usage: Set REVIEW_MD (path to the finished review markdown). Output: citation_report.json with total_dois, verified[], failed[], metadata{}.
limitation: Requires the requests library and outbound network to doi.org + CrossRef. Offline (or with requests absent) the porter degrades: it still writes a report, but every DOI lands in failed[]. Only the first three authors per work are captured.
